splash.tagline: An intimate experience in Santiago de los Caballeros.

rules.title: House rules
rules.subtitle: A calm, harmonious environment for everyone.

silencio.title: Quiet hours
silencio.desc: From 10:00 p.m. to 8:00 a.m. please keep noise to a minimum out of respect for neighbors.

huespedes.title: Registered guests
huespedes.desc: Only guests listed on the reservation may stay overnight.

mascotas.title: Pets
mascotas.desc: Pets are not allowed unless previously authorized in writing.

fumar.title: No smoking
fumar.desc: This is a smoke-free property. Smoking is only allowed in designated outdoor areas.

amenidades.title: Amenities
amenidades.desc: Pool and gym open from 6:00 a.m. to 10:00 p.m. per building regulations.

checkout.title: Check-out
checkout.desc: Check-out at 11:00 a.m. Let us know if you need a late departure.
